what_changes: Keep the same repo-native FireRedAsr2 AED import/load/infer path.
Keep the same Python 3.10 model-local venv backend.
Replace the upstream CUDA-pinned dependency file with the recorded CPU fallback `requirements.phase1.txt`.
Proceed to FETCH_WEIGHTS and VALIDATE_* only after the fallback dependency plan installs successfully.
replan.why_targeted: This change directly mitigates the diagnosed incompatible dependency layer without broadening scope, switching runtime family, or mutating upstream source.
